arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the VPC link.

id.description: The unique identifier of the VPC link.

name.description: The name given to the VPC link.

security_group_ids.description: A list of security group IDs associated with the VPC link.

subnet_ids.description: A list of subnet IDs associated with the VPC link.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the VPC link.
